# SCSchemaDefinitions

## [Overview](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scschemadefinitions#Overview)

This document describes keys and values used to access elements in the System Configuration persistent store.

## [Topics](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scschemadefinitions#topics)

### [Constants](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scschemadefinitions#Constants)

[Generic Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/generic-keys)General-purpose keys that apply to multiple dictionaries in the persistent store.[Preference Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/preference-keys)Keys that correspond to preferences in the persistent store.[Component Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/component-keys)Keys that correspond to components in the persistent store.[Network Dictionary Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/network-dictionary-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCCompNetwork` dictionary.[Interface Dictionary Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/interface-dictionary-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCCompInterface` dictionary.[Hostnames Dictionary Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/hostnames-dictionary-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCCompHostnames` dictionary.[Network Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/network-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to network entity dictionaries in the persistent store.[DNS Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/dns-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNetDNS` dictionary.[Ethernet Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/ethernet-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNetEthernet` dictionary.[Interface Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/interface-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNetInterface` dictionary.[IPSec Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/ipsec-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNetIPSec` dictionary.[IPv4 Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/ipv4-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNetIPv4` dictionary.[IPv6 Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/ipv6-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNetIPv6` dictionary.[6to4 Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/6to4-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNet6to4` dictionary.[Link Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/link-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNetLink` dictionary.[Modem Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/modem-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNetModem` dictionary.[PPP Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/ppp-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNetPPP` dictionary.[L2TP Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/l2tp-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNetL2TP` dictionary.[Proxies Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/proxies-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNetProxies` dictionary.[SMB Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/smb-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCEntNetSMB` dictionary.[CompUsers Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/compusers-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the [`kSCCompUsers`](/documentation/systemconfiguration/ksccompusers-swift.var) dictionary.[CompSystem Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/compsystem-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the `kSCCompSystem` dictionary.[Dynamic Store Domain Prefixes](/documentation/systemconfiguration/dynamic-store-domain-prefixes)Prefixes used to access information in the dynamic store.[Dynamic Store Entity Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/dynamic-store-entity-keys)Keys that correspond to values in the dynamic store.[Reserved Keys](/documentation/systemconfiguration/reserved-keys)Keys that have a reserved usage.## [See Also](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scschemadefinitions#see-also)
